auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Mailboxlayer uses your APILayer API key as the access_key query parameter. Find or rotate it on your APILayer Account page: https://apilayer.com/docs/article/managing-api-keys.

actions.name: check_email
actions.description: Validate a single email address and return Mailboxlayer quality signals.

smtp.description: Whether to perform the SMTP validation check.

format.description: Whether to enable pretty-printed JSON output for debugging.

mx.description: Whether to check whether the domain has MX records.

free.description: Whether to enable this Mailboxlayer validation check. When provided, the flag is sent as 1 or 0.

role.description: Whether to enable this Mailboxlayer validation check. When provided, the flag is sent as 1 or 0.

catch_all.description: Whether to enable this Mailboxlayer validation check. When provided, the flag is sent as 1 or 0.

disposable.description: Whether to enable this Mailboxlayer validation check. When provided, the flag is sent as 1 or 0.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for validating a single email address with Mailboxlayer.

did_you_mean.description: Suggested corrected email address when a typo is detected.

user.description: The local part of the email address.

domain.description: The domain part of the email address.

format_valid.description: Whether the email address format is valid.

mx_found.description: Whether MX records were found for the email domain.

anyOf.description: Whether the domain appears to accept all addresses.

role.description: Whether the address is role-based, such as support@ or admin@.

disposable.description: Whether the address belongs to a disposable email provider.

free.description: Whether the address belongs to a free email provider.
